title: Some More Obsidian!
description: This Minecraft Mod adds Obsidian Tools, Armor, and Ingots into the game!
body:
# Some More Obsidian!
This is the **First Mod** I have ever made for Minecraft!

Some More Obsidian adds Obsidian Armor & Tools into the game and Obsidian Ingots!

# Some More Obsidian Guide

## How do I get Obsidian Ingots?

To get Obsidian Ingots, you first have to **mine Obsidian or Crying Obsidian**. After that, you need to **Smelt the Obsidian or Crying Obsidian** with a Furnace. Then, you should have an Obsidian Ingot!

![Smelting Obsidian Into an Obsidian Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a76da13cb37c1b8ab5f916e262d88981eae210ca.png)

![Smelting Crying Obsidian into an Obsidian Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a76da13cb37c1b8ab5f916e262d88981eae210ca.png)

## How do I craft Obsidian Armor?

To craft Obsidian Armor, it's the same way to craft any armor, just with Obsidian Ingots!

![Crafting an Obsidian Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66a167b38fb5b7487ad8287287a6c9cfb7f9d456_0.webp)

![Crafting an Obsidian Chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9dc841f8521c44ca5c2f47f73db0edba3e5c5cc.png)

![Crafting Obsidian Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff5f7fd24a38771e93def7433192b52980fe4a5d.png)

![Crafting Obsidian Boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83673652200f34b583c050d9aaaf3e7035e80d7b.png)

## How do I craft Obsidian Tools?

To craft Obsidian Tools, like the Obsidian Armor, you can craft them like any other tools!

![Crafting an Obsidian Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e0b2235c36ef005acc27503ca451852366a4c14.png)

![Crafting an Obsidian Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/707339a53618696d8a3975e182634933eb06172c.png)

![Crafting an Obsidian Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/025aa2fa32e99de177f9e17caa8e542fc5739411.png)

![Crafting an Obsidian Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75f32832108258f39493a9f5173baad1e52851c.png)

![Crafting an Obsidian Shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e00f26bcbc4bf19ad8ac0a4d8078b48030ddad0.png)

## Uh oh! I smelted too much Obsidian! How do I get my Obsidian back?

It's easy to get your Obsidian Back if you smelted too much of it! If you want an Obsidian Block, just fill the crafting table up with Obsidian Ingots, and you should get an Obsidian Block!

![Crafting an Obsidian Block with Obsidian Ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653a4f04904c0e36953b4a75f89d78ed3ce0a4f8.png)

If you want to get a Crying Obsidian block, just put a Ghast Tear in the center of the Crafting Table, then fill the rest with Obsidian Ingots!

![Crafting a Crying Obsidian Block with Obsidian Ingots and a Ghast Tear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c952315d72c25879d2157cd00b001b32c159d22.png)

## Are there any Achievements with this mod?

Yes! There is one Achievement that you get with this mod!

The Achievement's name is "Innovator" and you can get it by Smelting Obsidian or Crying Obsidian and getting your First Obsidian Ingot!

![Getting the Innovator Achievement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2745d79f43cae56a2795731a2a4806eef05638fd.png)

If you have any other questions/requests, please send me a message! Thank you for checking out my mod!
